ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the card */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the card's image */,
  "upgraded_image_path" TEXT /* File path to the upgraded version of the card's image */,
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rarity level of the card */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the card */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost to play the card */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card's effects */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_rarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("rarity_id") REFERENCES card_rarity ("rarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES card_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of card */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the card type (e.g., Attack, Skill) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_rarity" (
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rarity level */,
  "rarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the rarity level (e.g., Basic, Common) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rarity level */,
  "drop_rate" REAL /* Drop rate of the rarity level (e.g., 0.1 for 10%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card this effect belongs to */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the card's effect */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of the effect (e.g., damage, block, vulnerable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_effects_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card this image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the card's image */,
  "upgraded_image_path" TEXT /* File path to the upgraded version of the card's image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_images_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, designer, tester) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the card data */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the card data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the card data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_revisions_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_mechanics" (
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanic */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card this mechanic belongs to */,
  "mechanic_name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanic (e.g., attack, skill) */,
  "mechanic_description" TEXT /* Description of the mechanic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_mechanics_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card this tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., beginner, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_tags_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)
